block_05: ZigZag: An Indicator to Eliminate Noise
block_06: The ZigZag indicator aims at simplifying the chart and removing price noise to reveal the actual underlying trend. Understanding how to use the ZigZag indicator in combination with other tools may enhance your approach.
block_09: Forex trading used to demand big investments, but for those unable to invest large sums, Forex trading on margin is an option. This involves using a broker's funds secured by a pre-agreed amount (margin).
